name: Yet Another Brownie Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter an 8-inch square cake pan and set aside.
3. Chop the walnuts in a food processor fitted with a steel blade and set aside.
4. Chop the chocolate into small pieces and melt with the butter over hot, not boiling water. Stir until smooth.
5. Remove from the heat and stir in the sugar, then the flour, then the eggs, then the nuts.
6. Pour into the prepared pan and smooth the top.
7. Bake 20 to 25 minutes. Brownies will pull away from the sides of the pan.
8. Allow brownies to cool in the pan on a rack. Cut into squares.
To freeze brownies, place in a single layer and protect them first with plastic wrap and then with aluminum foil.
